text:
was a skilled member of the Survey Corps and a participant during the 57th Expedition Outside the Walls.

Personality

Siss seemed to be a trusted and loyal member of the Survey Corps. He trusted and respected his superior and team leader Dita Ness.

Appearance

Siss was a man of average height and had chin-length, straight dark hair tied back in a ponytail. He wore the typical Survey Corps uniform.

Story

The Female Titan arc

During the 57th Expedition Outside the Walls, Siss works with Dita Ness to take down an abnormal Titan, with Ness taking out the Titan's ankles, and Siss destroying its nape. Almost immediately after, another Titan appears. Following Ness's lead again, Siss tries to strike at the Titan, but it intercepts and crushes him effortlessly.

People killed

Failed attempts

Annie Leonhart

Trivia

He shares a birthday with Zofia.
